For square 1 (30.5, 29.5), the distance to (31, 37) is about 7.5.

Actually, wait. I can click on positions that are NOT on the blue shape to move squares. For example, if I click on a position near square 3, it will move square 3 toward that position. Then I can click on a position on the blue shape that's closer to square 3 than to the other squares.

Alternatively, maybe I can click on positions on the blue shape that are closer to square 3 than to squares 1 or 2, after moving squares 1 and 2 to different positions on the blue shape.

So if I want to teleport square 3 to the blue shape, I need to click on a position on the blue shape that's closer to square 3 than to any other square.

Wait, let me re-examine. I clicked at (31, 30), and square 2 moved from (39.5, 19.5) to... where? Let me check the current positions again.
